arts.ttl: Man United 'make major call' on Joshua Zirkzee future amid Juventus, Napoli 'interest'
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly agree to let Joshua Zirkzee leave the club on loan in January amid interest from Juventus and Napoli.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Juventus v Fiorentina: Match Preview
arts.sum: Juventus and Fiorentina are set to clash in a pivotal Serie A match on Sunday evening at the Allianz Stadium in Turin. Both teams are currently level on points, with Juventus in sixth place and Fiorentina just above them in fifth. This encounter is crucial for both sides as they strive to maintain their positions in the race for the Scudetto.
